recommended_policy.policy: Metadata patch preview is non-behavioral only.
recommended_policy.reason: The preview proposes comment metadata blocks only; it must not change execution logic.
Even non-behavioral metadata patches should be applied only after review.

recommended_policy.policy: No target file mutation in preview module.
recommended_policy.reason: This module writes only its own JSON/TXT artifacts.

forbidden_actions: Do not delete or move backup files.
Do not enable or send real orders.
Do not run old_short guarded apply.
